description: A highly detailed, 15-second prompt for generating a live-action adaptation of an anime-style duel, featuring 'Water Breathing' (blue water dragon) versus 'Thunder Breathing' (golden lightning). The p

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成动漫风格真人对决场景的详细提示词，展现「水之呼吸」（蓝色水龙）与「雷之呼吸」（金色闪电）的 15 秒战斗画面。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成動漫風格真人對決場景的詳細提示詞，呈現「水之呼吸」（藍色水龍）與「雷之呼吸」（金色閃電）的 15 秒戰鬥畫面。
description_i18n.ja: アニメスタイルの実写デュエルシーンを生成する詳細なプロンプト。「水の呼吸」（青い水龍）と「雷の呼吸」（金色の雷）による15秒の戦闘映像を作成します。
description_i18n.ko: 애니메이션 스타일의 실사 대결 장면을 생성하는 상세 프롬프트. '물의 호흡'(파란 물 용)과 '번개의 호흡'(황금빛 번개)의 15초 전투 영상을 제작합니다.
description_i18n.de: Detaillierter Prompt zur Generierung einer Live-Action-Adaption eines Anime-Duells mit 'Wasseratmung' (blauer Wasserdrache) gegen 'Donneratmung' (goldener Blitz) in 15 Sekunden.
description_i18n.fr: Prompt détaillé pour générer une adaptation en prise de vue réelle d'un duel de style anime, avec la 'Respiration de l'Eau' (dragon d'eau bleu) contre la 'Respiration du Tonnerre' (éclair doré) en 15 secondes.
description_i18n.ru: Подробный промпт для создания игровой экранизации дуэли в стиле аниме с «Дыханием Воды» (синий водяной дракон) против «Дыхания Грома» (золотая молния) длительностью 15 секунд.
description_i18n.es: Prompt detallado para generar una adaptación en acción real de un duelo estilo anime, presentando 'Respiración de Agua' (dragón de agua azul) contra 'Respiración de Trueno' (relámpago dorado) en 15 segundos.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Prompt detalhado para gerar uma adaptação live-action de um duelo estilo anime, apresentando 'Respiração da Água' (dragão de água azul) versus 'Respiração do Trovão' (raio dourado) em 15 segundos.
description_i18n.it: Prompt dettagliato per generare un adattamento live-action di un duello in stile anime, con 'Respiro dell'Acqua' (drago d'acqua blu) contro 'Respiro del Tuono' (fulmine dorato) in 15 secondi.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt chi tiết để tạo cảnh đối đầu live-action phong cách anime, với 'Hơi thở Nước' (rồng nước xanh) đấu với 'Hơi thở Sấm' (sét vàng) trong 15 giây.
description_i18n.pl: Szczegółowy prompt do generowania aktorskiej adaptacji pojedynku w stylu anime, przedstawiający 'Oddech Wody' (niebieski smok wodny) kontra 'Oddech Pioruna' (złota błyskawica) w 15-sekundowym ujęciu.
description_i18n.id: Prompt terperinci untuk menghasilkan adaptasi live-action duel gaya anime, menampilkan 'Napas Air' (naga air biru) melawan 'Napas Petir' (kilat emas) dalam 15 detik.
description_i18n.nl: Gedetailleerde prompt voor het genereren van een live-action adaptatie van een anime-duel, met 'Waterademhaling' (blauwe waterdraak) versus 'Donderademhaling' (gouden bliksem) in 15 seconden.
description_i18n.ar: موجه تفصيلي لإنشاء اقتباس حي لمبارزة بأسلوب الأنمي، يعرض 'تنفس الماء' (تنين الماء الأزرق) ضد 'تنفس الرعد' (البرق الذهبي) في 15 ثانية.
description_i18n.tr: Anime tarzı bir düellonun canlı aksiyon uyarlamasını oluşturmak için detaylı prompt. 'Su Nefesi' (mavi su ejderhası) ile 'Gök Gürültüsü Nefesi' (altın yıldırım) arasındaki 15 saniyelik mücadele.
description_i18n.uk: Детальний промпт для створення екранізації дуелі в стилі аніме з «Диханням Води» (синій водяний дракон) проти «Дихання Грому» (золота блискавка) тривалістю 15 секунд.
description_i18n.en: A highly detailed, 15-second prompt for generating a live-action adaptation of an anime-style duel, featuring 'Water Breathing' (blue water dragon) versus 'Thunder Breathing' (golden lightning). The p

query.en:
Live-Action Anime Adaptation · Breathing Technique Decisive Battle (15 seconds · Super Burning Special Effects Version)
【Core Focus】: Water Breathing (Blue Water Dragon) VS Thunder Breathing (Golden Lightning), live-action extreme speed duel.

【Style】: Hollywood live-action anime adaptation film quality, dark samurai style, 4K ultra-clear, extreme fast cuts, explosive particle light effects, no gore.
【Duration】: 15 seconds
【Scene】: Misty forest under the moonlight, muddy ground, falling leaves.

[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Water Melody Prelude · Starting Stance (Sense of charging)
Visuals: A young samurai wearing a green and black checkered haori (jacket), lowering his center of gravity under the moonlight, gripping his sword with both hands.
Action: He takes a deep breath, and the surrounding air instantly solidifies. As he draws his sword, a giant blue water dragon, condensed from high-pressure water flow, appears out of thin air, rotating rapidly around his body and blade, emitting the roar of flowing water.
Special Effects Details: The water flow has a realistic sense of splashing, illuminating the dark forest.

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Thunder Flash · Charge (Sense of extreme speed)
Visuals: The opponent, a blonde swordsman wearing a yellow triangular patterned haori, is crouched extremely low, adopting the posture of Iaijutsu (sword drawing technique).
Action: The ground suddenly explodes, and he instantly transforms into a dazzling golden lightning afterimage, refracting and charging through the forest in a "Z" shape at a speed undetectable by the naked eye.
Special Effects Details: Golden electric arcs and scorched fallen leaves remain in the places he passes.

[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Water and Thunder Collision · Final Sound (Ultimate move clash)
Visuals: Extreme speed collision. The young samurai swings the giant blue water dragon down to meet the attack, and the blonde swordsman, transformed into lightning, crashes into him head-on.
Action: The two swords violently collide in the center of the frame.
Special Effects Spectacle: The blue water dragon and the golden lightning instantly explode, forming a massive water-thunder energy storm that spreads outwards. The surrounding large trees are snapped in half by the energy wave, and mud and light obscure the camera. The scene ends in an extremely dazzling blue, yellow, and white light.
